question: Implement a `StringWrapper` class that dynamically allocates memory for a C-style string. Provide a copy constructor that performs a deep copy to prevent issues with shallow copies.

test_cases.expected:
--- Testing Correct Version ---
s_empty: 
s_hello: Hello
s_copy (from s_hello): Hello
s_copy_world (from s_world): World!
s_assigned (before assignment): Original Content
s_assigned (after s_hello assignment): Hello
s_another (initial): Another one
s_another (after s_world assignment): World!
Self assigning s_hello = s_hello...
s_hello (after self-assignment): Hello
s_assigned (after s_empty assignment): 
--- End Test ---
